title: まあ、アイスでも食べようよ

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you can't hog all the shade—it's against the
law! I'm gonna find Teach and snitch on yooou! ☆

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Oh, Sky... What do you want?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nothing... just the best spot to eat some ice
cream.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Haven't I already told you the perfect place is a
room chilled to perfection?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes it's better to get that chilly kick in the
sweltering heat.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Lies. You're just here to meddle. My test scores
weren't so great, okay? Is that what you want to
hear?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Five points down from your average is still great.
High achievers like you hardly need my worry.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Five points is a big difference! Marks off over such a rudimentary mistake... This is not how a first-rate student should be.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But I won't be feeling sorry for myself. I'm already
preparing for the next test, so—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
My ice cream's all melty now... probably 'cause of
you rambling on for so long. Welp, now you're
taking me to the store to buy a replacement! ☆

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Don't put the blame on me! I'm not buying
you anything! Sky, are you listening to me?!
